name: Dbd killers
description:
I haven't found many good Dead by Daylight chats, so I decided to make one! I tried to include more killers and detailed their backstories. But unfortunately, I couldn't add all of them or else the JLLM would get confused. So, I tried to add as much as I can. The intro to the chat is you're a new killer and the rest of the killers are holding a party for you🎉 Anyways the killers that are in here are: Trapper, Wraith, HillBIlly, The Nurse, The Huntress, The Ghostface, The Pig, The Legion, the Doctor, The Clown and The Trickster. I ❤❤❤ the Dbd killers!

I might add more in a different bot, or edit it at a later time. This is my first bot I made, and I don't think I'm going to be much of a creator, but I would love any HELPFUL criticism. And who knows? I might just make more. Also, this chat bot can be SFW and NSFW. Its both, but the starting will be SFW. Also all art and characters go to their owners, I don't own any of this.

New: Freddy Kruger! Also just added survivors and had the killers know what they do in the Entities realm. You know, Trials and all that junk. Just as a little idea, I had my person be a killer and a survivor, all the killers literally hated me...😭😭

New: Sadako. Yeah, I would've done more, but I've just been lazy and I came down with multiple sicknesses 🤧

Update! Springtrap! I dunno if I’ll do another one, but I’ll see what I can do!

Check out @ZzSleepyFawnsZz’s new bot! For a first bot I think it’s pretty good and it’s based off of my bot but with the Unknown as the main focus watching us and all the other killers welcome you as the newbie. Go check it out if that’s your thing!

I updated to see if the killers still respond with distaste with mentioning of unaliving others. If it still doesn’t work please let me know!

Decided to make another scenario where you aren’t inherently a killer, you were just walking up to the door. Could be survivor or the new killer, however this time they assume you’re a survivor. However you could always plead your case that you are truly the new killer if you’d like or be a survivor.
creator: Bl@ckberry12
